headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Lululemon Athletica, Lowers Price Target to $105
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Ike Boruchow   maintains Lululemon Athletica (NASDAQ:LULU) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $110 to $105.
